and [[erosion]] | list4 = * [[Abrasion (geology)]] * [[Anabranch]] * [[Aggradation]] * [[Armor (hydrology)]] * [[Bed load]] * [[Bed material load]] * [[Granular flow]] * [[Debris flow]] * [[Deposition (geology)]] * [[Dissolved load]] * [[Downcutting]] * [[Erosion]] * [[Headward erosion]] * [[Knickpoint]] * [[Palaeochannel]] * [[Progradation]] * [[Retrogradation]] * [[Saltation (geology)]] * [[Secondary flow#River bends|Secondary flow]] * [[Sediment transport]] * [[Suspended load]] * [[Wash load]] * [[Water gap]] | group5 = [[Fluvial#Fluvial landforms|Fluvial landforms]] | list5 = * [[Ait]] * [[Alluvial fan]] * [[Antecedent drainage stream]] * [[Avulsion (river)]] * [[Bank (geography)]] * [[Bar (river morphology)]] * [[Bayou]] * [[Billabong]] * [[Canyon]] * [[Chine]] * [[Cut bank]] * [[Estuary]] * [[Fluvial terrace]] * [[Gulch]] * [[Gully]] * [[Glen]] * [[Meander scar]] * [[Mouth bar]] * [[Oxbow lake]] * [[Riffle-pool sequence]] * [[Point bar]] * [[Ravine]] * [[Rill]] * [[River island]] * [[Rock-cut basin]] * [[Sedimentary basin]] * [[Sedimentary structures]] * [[Strath]] * [[Thalweg]] * [[Valley|River valley]] * [[Wadi]] | group6 = [[Fluvial#Fluvial processes|Fluvial flow]] | list6 = * [[Helicoidal flow]] * [[International Scale of River Difficulty]] * [[Meander]] * [[Plunge pool]] * [[Rapid]] * [[Riffle]] * [[Shoal]] * [[Waterfall]] * [[Whitewater]] | group7 = [[Surface runoff]] | list7 = * [[Agricultural wastewater treatment]] * [[Effluent]] * [[First flush]] * [[Urban runoff]] * [[Wastewater]] | group8 = [[Flood]]s and [[stormwater]] | list8 = * [[100-year flood]] * [[Crevasse splay]] * [[Flash flood]] * [[Flood]] * [[Flood barrier]] * [[Flood control]] * [[Flood forecasting]] * [[Flood-meadow]] * [[Floodplain]] * [[Flood pulse concept]] * [[Flooded grasslands and savannas]] * [[Storm Water Management Model]] * [[Return period]] | group9 = River measurement
and modelling | list9 = * [[Baer's law]] * [[Baseflow]] * [[Bradshaw model]] * [[Discharge (hydrology)]] * [[Drainage density]] * [[Exner equation]] * [[Groundwater model]] * [[Hack's law]] * [[Hjulström curve]] * [[Hydrograph]] * [[Hydrological modelling]] * [[Hydrological transport model]] * [[Infiltration (hydrology)]] * [[Main stem]] * [[Playfair's Law]] * [[Relief ratio]] * [[River continuum concept]] * [[Rouse number]] * [[Runoff curve number]] * [[Runoff model (reservoir)]] * [[Stream gauge]] * [[Universal Soil Loss Equation]] * [[WAFLEX]] * [[Wetted perimeter]] * [[Volumetric flow rate]] | group10 = [[River engineering]] | list10 = * [[Aqueduct]] * [[Balancing lake]] * [[Canal]] * [[Check dam]] * [[Dam]] * [[Drop structure]] * [[Daylighting (streams)]] * [[Detention basin]] * [[Erosion control]] * [[Fish ladder]] * [[Floodplain restoration]] * [[Flume]] * [[Infiltration basin]] * [[Leat]] * [[Levee]] * [[Retention basin]] * [[Revetment]] * [[Riparian zone restoration]] * [[Stream restoration]] * [[Weir]] | group11 = River sports | list11 = * [[Canyoning]] * [[Rafting]] * [[River surfing]] * [[Riverboarding]] * [[Whitewater canoeing]] * [[Whitewater kayaking]] * [[Whitewater slalom]] | group12 = Other topics | list12 = * [[Aquifer]] * [[Aquatic toxicology]] * [[Body of water]] * [[Limnology]] * [[Riparian zone]] * [[River civilization]] * [[River cruise]] * [[Surface water]] * [[World Rivers Day]] | below = : [[Lists of rivers]] : [[List of rivers by continent|Rivers by continent]] : [[List of rivers by length|Rivers by length]] : [[List of rivers by discharge|Rivers by discharge rate]] : [[List of drainage basins|Drainage basins]] : [[List of whitewater rivers|Whitewater rivers]] : [[List of flash floods|Flash floods]] : [[List of river name etymologies|River name etymologies]] }} [[Category:River navigational boxes| ]]

{{navbox | name = Rivers, streams and springs | title = [[River]]s, [[stream]]s and [[Spring (hydrology)|springs]] | bodyclass = hlist | state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} | image = [[File:Stream in the redwoods.jpg|140px]] | group1 = [[River]]s | list1 = * [[Alluvial river]] * [[Braided river]] * [[Blackwater river]] * [[Channel (geography)|Channel]] * [[Channel pattern]] * [[Channel types]] * [[Confluence]] * [[Distributary]] * [[Drainage basin]] * [[Subterranean river]] * [[River bifurcation]] * [[River ecosystem]] * [[River source]] * [[Tributary]] * [[:Category:Rivers|more...]] | group2 = [[Stream]]s | list2 = * [[Arroyo (creek)|Arroyo]] * [[Bourne (stream)|Bourne]] * [[Burn (landform)|Burn]] * [[Chalk stream]] * [[Coulee]] * [[Current (stream)|Current]] * [[Gill (stream)|Gill]] * [[Stream]] * [[Stream bed]] * [[Stream channel]] * [[Stream gradient]] * [[Stream pool]] * [[Perennial stream]] * [[Winterbourne (stream)|Winterbourne]] * [[:Category:Water streams|more...]] | group3 = [[Spring (hydrology)|Springs]] | list3 = * [[Geyser]] * [[Holy well|Sacred spring]] * [[Hot spring]] * [[Mineral spring]] * [[Rhythmic spring]] * [[Spring (hydrology)|Spring]] * [[Spring horizon]] * [[:Category:Springs|more...]] | group4 = [[Sediment|Sedimentary processes]]
and [[erosion]] | list4 = * [[Abrasion (geology)|Abrasion]] * [[Anabranch]] * [[Aggradation]] * [[Armor (hydrology)|Armor]] * [[Bed load]] * [[Bed material load]] * [[Granular flow]] * [[Debris flow]] * [[Deposition (geology)|Deposition]] * [[Dissolved load]] * [[Downcutting]] * [[Erosion]] * [[Headward erosion]] * [[Knickpoint]] * [[Palaeochannel]] * [[Progradation]] * [[Retrogradation]] * [[Saltation (geology)|Saltation]] * [[Secondary flow#River bends|Secondary flow]] * [[Sediment transport]] * [[Suspended load]] * [[Wash load]] * [[Water gap]] | group5 = [[Fluvial#Fluvial landforms|Fluvial landforms]] | list5 = * [[Ait]] * [[Alluvial fan]] * [[Antecedent drainage stream]] * [[Avulsion (river)|Avulsion]] * [[Bank (geography)|Bank]] * [[Bar (river morphology)|Bar]] * [[Bayou]] * [[Billabong]] * [[Canyon]] * [[Chine]] * [[Cut bank]] * [[Estuary]] * [[Fluvial terrace]] * [[Gulch]] * [[Gully]] * [[Glen]] * [[Meander scar]] * [[Mouth bar]] * [[Oxbow lake]] * [[Riffle-pool sequence]] * [[Point bar]] * [[Ravine]] * [[Rill]] * [[River island]] * [[Rock-cut basin]] * [[Sedimentary basin]] * [[Sedimentary structures]] * [[Strath]] * [[Thalweg]] * [[Valley|River valley]] * [[Wadi]] | group6 = [[Fluvial#Fluvial processes|Fluvial flow]] | list6 = * [[Helicoidal flow]] * [[International Scale of River Difficulty]] * [[Meander]] * [[Plunge pool]] * [[Rapid]] * [[Riffle]] * [[Shoal]] * [[Waterfall]] * [[Whitewater]] | group7 = [[Surface runoff]] | list7 = * [[Agricultural wastewater treatment]] * [[Effluent]] * [[First flush]] * [[Urban runoff]] * [[Wastewater]] | group8 = [[Flood]]s and [[stormwater]] | list8 = * [[100-year flood]] * [[Crevasse splay]] * [[Flash flood]] * [[Flood]] * [[Flood barrier]] * [[Flood control]] * [[Flood forecasting]] * [[Flood-meadow]] * [[Floodplain]] * [[Flood pulse concept]] * [[Flooded grasslands and savannas]] * [[Storm Water Management Model]] * [[Return period]] | group9 = River measurement
and modelling | list9 = * [[Baer's law]] * [[Baseflow]] * [[Bradshaw model]] * [[Discharge (hydrology)]] * [[Drainage density]] * [[Exner equation]] * [[Groundwater model]] * [[Hack's law]] * [[Hjulström curve]] * [[Hydrograph]] * [[Hydrological modelling]] * [[Hydrological transport model]] * [[Infiltration (hydrology)]] * [[Main stem]] * [[Playfair's Law]] * [[Relief ratio]] * [[River continuum concept]] * [[Rouse number]] * [[Runoff curve number]] * [[Runoff model (reservoir)]] * [[Stream gauge]] * [[Universal Soil Loss Equation]] * [[WAFLEX]] * [[Wetted perimeter]] * [[Volumetric flow rate]] | group10 = [[River engineering]] | list10 = * [[Aqueduct (bridge)|Aqueduct]] * [[Balancing lake]] * [[Canal]] * [[Check dam]] * [[Dam]] * [[Drop structure]] * [[Daylighting (streams)|Daylighting]] * [[Detention basin]] * [[Erosion control]] * [[Fish ladder]] * [[Floodplain restoration]] * [[Flume]] * [[Infiltration basin]] * [[Leat]] * [[Levee]] * [[Retention basin]] * [[Revetment]] * [[Riparian zone restoration]] * [[Stream restoration]] * [[Weir]] | group11 = River sports | list11 = * [[Canyoning]] * [[Rafting]] * [[River surfing]] * [[Riverboarding]] * [[Whitewater canoeing]] * [[Whitewater kayaking]] * [[Whitewater slalom]] | group12 = Other topics | list12 = * [[Aquifer]] * [[Aquatic toxicology]] * [[Body of water]] * [[Limnology]] * [[Riparian zone]] * [[River civilization]] * [[River cruise]] * [[Surface water]] * [[World Rivers Day]] | below = : [[Lists of rivers]] : [[List of rivers by continent|Rivers by continent]] : [[List of rivers by length|Rivers by length]] : [[List of rivers by discharge|Rivers by discharge rate]] : [[List of drainage basins|Drainage basins]] : [[List of whitewater rivers|Whitewater rivers]] : [[List of flash floods|Flash floods]] : [[List of river name etymologies|River name etymologies]] }} {{collapsible option}} [[Category:River navigational boxes| ]]

and [[erosion]] | list4 = * [[Abrasion (geology)|Abrasion]] * [[Anabranch]] * [[Aggradation]] * [[Armor (hydrology)|Armor]] * [[Bed load]] * [[Bed material load]] * [[Granular flow]] * [[Debris flow]] * [[Deposition (geology)|Deposition]] * [[Dissolved load]] * [[Downcutting]] * [[Erosion]] * [[Headward erosion]] * [[Knickpoint]] * [[Palaeochannel]] * [[Progradation]] * [[Retrogradation]] * [[Saltation (geology)|Saltation]] * [[Secondary flow#River bends|Secondary flow]] * [[Sediment transport]] * [[Suspended load]] * [[Wash load]] * [[Water gap]] | group5 = [[Fluvial#Fluvial landforms|Fluvial landforms]] | list5 = * [[Ait]] * [[Alluvial fan]] * [[Antecedent drainage stream]] * [[Avulsion (river)|Avulsion]] * [[Bank (geography)|Bank]] * [[Bar (river morphology)|Bar]] * [[Bayou]] * [[Billabong]] * [[Canyon]] * [[Chine]] * [[Cut bank]] * [[Estuary]] * [[Fluvial terrace]] * [[Gill (ravine)|Gill]] * [[Gulch]] * [[Gully]] * [[Glen]] * [[Meander scar]] * [[Mouth bar]] * [[Oxbow lake]] * [[Riffle-pool sequence]] * [[Point bar]] * [[Ravine]] * [[Rill]] * [[River island]] * [[Rock-cut basin]] * [[Sedimentary basin]] * [[Sedimentary structures]] * [[Strath]] * [[Thalweg]] * [[Valley|River valley]] * [[Wadi]] | group6 = [[Fluvial#Fluvial processes|Fluvial flow]] | list6 = * [[Helicoidal flow]] * [[International scale of river difficulty]] * [[Meander]] * [[Plunge pool]] * [[Rapids]] * [[Riffle]] * [[Shoal]] * [[Waterfall]] * [[Whitewater]] | group7 = [[Surface runoff]] | list7 = * [[Agricultural wastewater treatment]] * [[Effluent]] * [[First flush]] * [[Urban runoff]] * [[Wastewater]] | group8 = [[Flood]]s and [[stormwater]] | list8 = * [[100-year flood]] * [[Crevasse splay]] * [[Flash flood]] * [[Flood]] * [[Flood barrier]] * [[Flood control]] * [[Flood forecasting]] * [[Flood-meadow]] * [[Floodplain]] * [[Flood pulse concept]] * [[Flooded grasslands and savannas]] * [[Storm Water Management Model]] * [[Return period]] | group9 = River measurement
and modelling | list9 = * [[Baer's law]] * [[Baseflow]] * [[Bradshaw model]] * [[Discharge (hydrology)]] * [[Drainage density]] * [[Exner equation]] * [[Groundwater model]] * [[Hack's law]] * [[Hjulström curve]] * [[Hydrograph]] * [[Hydrological modelling]] * [[Hydrological transport model]] * [[Infiltration (hydrology)]] * [[Main stem]] * [[Playfair's law]] * [[Relief ratio]] * [[River Continuum Concept]] * [[Rouse number]] * [[Runoff curve number]] * [[Runoff model (reservoir)]] * [[Stream gauge]] * [[Universal Soil Loss Equation]] * [[WAFLEX]] * [[Wetted perimeter]] * [[Volumetric flow rate]] | group10 = [[River engineering]] | list10 = * [[Aqueduct (bridge)|Aqueduct]] * [[Balancing lake]] * [[Canal]] * [[Check dam]] * [[Dam]] * [[Drop structure]] * [[Daylighting (streams)|Daylighting]] * [[Detention basin]] * [[Erosion control]] * [[Fish ladder]] * [[Floodplain restoration]] * [[Flume]] * [[Infiltration basin]] * [[Leat]] * [[Levee]] * [[Retention basin]] * [[Revetment]] * [[Riparian zone restoration]] * [[Stream restoration]] * [[Weir]] | group11 = River sports | list11 = * [[Canyoning]] * [[Rafting]] * [[River surfing]] * [[Riverboarding]] * [[Whitewater canoeing]] * [[Whitewater kayaking]] * [[Whitewater slalom]] | group12 = Other topics | list12 = * [[Aquifer]] * [[Aquatic toxicology]] * [[Body of water]] * [[Limnology]] * [[Riparian zone]] * [[River civilization]] * [[River cruise]] * [[Surface water]] | below = : [[Lists of rivers]] : [[List of rivers by length|Rivers by length]] : [[List of rivers by discharge|Rivers by discharge rate]] : [[List of drainage basins|Drainage basins]] : [[List of whitewater rivers|Whitewater rivers]] : [[List of flash floods|Flash floods]] : [[List of river name etymologies|River name etymologies]] : [[List of countries without rivers|Countries without rivers]] }} {{collapsible option}} [[Category:River navigational boxes| ]]

revision.comment: Moved Sedimentary basin from a fluvial landform to Sediment|Sedimentary processes and erosion. That's still not perfect, but Sedimentary Basins only rarely are primarily fluvial

revision.comment: New section: Point source discharges. (Including [[Effluent]] and [[Sewage]] under "Surface runoff" is incorrect.) There are other water pollution-related articles which could be added to this section.

([[Lists of rivers|lists]]) | list1 = * [[:en:Alluvial river|Alluvial river]] * [[Braided river]] * [[Blackwater river]] * [[:en:Channel (geography)#Nautical channels|Channel]] * [[:en:Channel pattern|Channel pattern]] * [[:en:Channel types|Channel types]] * [[Confluence]] * [[Distributary]] * [[Drainage basin]] * [[Subterranean river]] * [[River bifurcation]] * [[River ecosystem]] * [[River source]] * [[Tributary]] | group2 = [[Stream]]s | list2 = * [[:en:Arroyo (watercourse)|Arroyo]] * [[Bourne (stream)|Bourne]] * [[Burn (landform)|Burn]] * [[:en:Chalk stream|Chalk stream]] * [[Coulee]] * [[Current (hydrology)|Current]] * [[Stream bed]] * [[Stream channel]] * [[Streamflow]] * [[Stream gradient]] * [[Stream pool]] * [[Perennial stream]] * [[Winterbourne (stream)|Winterbourne]] | group3 = [[Spring (hydrology)|Springs]]
